title: Fix Happy Clients count in Testimonials page to show 500,000+

requirements.summary: Update the Happy Clients statistic value from '10,000+' to '500,000+' in the Testimonials page while keeping all other content unchanged
acceptanceCriteria: The Testimonials page displays '500,000+' (or '500000+') for the Happy Clients count.
No other text, card, rating, layout, or styling on the Testimonials page is changed.
The Home page (Home.tsx) Happy Clients count is also verified to show '500,000+' if it references the same stat.

file_operations.description: Update the Happy Clients statistic value from '10,000+' (or any variant like '10000+') to '500,000+'. Locate the stats section that displays the Happy Clients count and change only that numeric value, preserving all other content, styling, and layout exactly as-is.

Verify and update the Happy Clients count to '500,000+' if it exists on the Home page. If the Home page displays a similar statistic, ensure consistency by updating it to match the new value. If no such stat exists, no changes are needed.
